steps.title: Identify the phrase
steps.content: The words after material form an infinitive phrase: to craft baskets that are both beautiful and whimsical. That phrase explains what the sweetgrass is used for, but it is not an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply boundary rules
steps.content: A semicolon and C period require an independent clause after them. B uses a colon where a simpler explanatory break is needed. An em dash can attach the purpose phrase to material without pretending it is a complete sentence. The answer is D.
